text: polos hashalicha lo mibeney adam velo 'al-yedey ven-adam ki im-'al-yedey yeshu'a hamashicha velohim haav asher he'iro min-hametim
vekhal-haachim asher 'imadi el-haqehilot asher begalateya
chesed lakhem veshalom meet haelohim avinu umeet adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
asher-natan et-nafesho 'al-chatoteynu lechaletsenu min-ha'olam hara' haze kiretson eloheynu avinu
asher-lo hakavod le'olemey 'olamim amen
tameha ani ki-saretem maher meacharey haqore etekhem bechesed hamashicha lishemo'a el-besora zara
vehi eynena acheret raq yesh anashim ha'okherim etekhem vachafetsim lahafokh et-besorat hamashicha
aval gam-anachenu o-maleakh min-hashamayim im-yavo levaser etekhem besora mibale'adey zot asher bisarenu etekhem cherem yiheye
kaasher amarenu khevar ken-omar 'ata 'od-hapa'am ish ki-yevaser etekhem besora mibale'adey asher qibaletem cherem yiheye
ki hamiteratse el-beney adam anokhi o el-haelohim im hamevaqesh anokhi limetso-chen be'eyney veney-adam hen bematsei chen be'eyney veney-adam lo-eheye 'eved hamashicha
umodi'a ani etekhem echay ki habesora asher bisareti lo-leadam hi
ki af lo meadam qibaletiha velo-melumedet hi li ki im-bechezeyon yeshu'a hamashicha
ki halo-shema'etem et-dareki milefanim badat hayehudit veet asher-takhelit redifa radafeti et-'adat elohim vehecherametiha
vaehi holekh vechazeq badat hayehudit 'al-rabim mibeney gili be'ami beqineati hagedola leqabalot shel-avotay
ukheshehaya ratson milifeney haelohim hamavedil oti merechem imi vayiqeraeni bechasedo
legalot bi et-beno lema'an avaserenu bagoyim az lo no'atseti 'im-basar vadam
gam lo-'aliti yerushalayema el-asher hayu shelichim lefanay ki im-halakheti la'arav umisham shaveti el-damaseq
acharey-khen miqets shalsh shanim 'aliti lirushalayim lireot et-keyfa vaeshev 'imo chamisha 'asar yom
veacher min-hashelichim lo-raiti zulati et-ya'aqov achi adoneynu
vaasher ani khotev aleykhem hine neged haelohim ki lo akhazev
acharey-khen bati el-gelilot sureya veqiliqeya
uqehilot yehuda asher bamashicha hena lo yade'u et-panay
raq-zot bilevad shame'u ki-harodef otanu meaz 'ata mevaser et-haemuna asher hecherim milefanim
vayehalalu vi et-haelohim
acharey-khen miqets areba' 'esere shana shaveti ve'aliti lirushalayim 'im bar-naba vaeqach iti gam et-titos
vaa'al shama 'al-pi machaze veet-habesora asher-qarati vagoyim sameti lifeneyhem vesametiha lifeney hachashuvim shebahem pen-tiheye lariq merutsati asher aruts vaasher-ratseti
aval gam-titos asher iti af ki-yevani hu lo hutserakh lehimol
mipeney achey hasheqer hamiteganevim betokhenu asher bau leragel et-cherutenu asher-lanu beyeshu'a hamashicha lema'an ha'avidenu
vaanachenu lo-sarenu lemishema'etam af-lo sha'a achat lema'an asher ta'amod beqirebekhem amitat habesora
vehanecheshavim liheyot ma hayu mah-shehayu eyni choshesh lahem ki haelohim lo yisa peney-ish hen li lo-hosifu hachashuvim kal-davar
vatehi lehefekh bireotam ki-hafeqadeti ani 'al-besorat ha'arelim kaasher hafeqad keyfa 'al besorat hamulim
ki-hame'ir keyfa leshalecho el-hamulim hu-he'irani gam-oti leshalecheni el-hagoyim
vekhaasher hikiru ya'aqov vekheyfa veyochanan hanecheshavim ke'amudim et-hachesed hanitan li natenu li ulevar-naba et-yad yeminam vaneot ki-nelekh anachenu el-hagoyim vehema el-hamulim
raq im-nizekor et-haeveyonim vehu hadavar asher shaqadeti la'asot
vekhaasher ba kheyfa leaneteyokheya hokhacheti dareko el-panayv ki nimetsa vo 'avel
ki lifeney vo anashim meet ya'aqov akhal 'im-hagoyim yachedav ukhevoam haya miteracheq uforesh mehem mipeney yireato et-beney hamila
vayekhachashu 'imo gam-shear hayehudim 'ad ki-nidach gam-bar-naba acharey khachasham
uvireoti shel yisheru lekhet kaamitat habesora amareti el-keyfa beazeney khulam im-ata hayehudi kenakheri titenaheg velo khihudi madu'a takhericha et-hagoyim lehitenaheg kayehudim
hen mizera' hayehudim anachenu velo chataim min-hagoyim

aval mipeney sheyode'im anachenu shel-yitsedaq adam mitokh ma'asey hatora ki im-beemunat yeshu'a hamashicha gam-anachenu heemanu bamashicha yeshu'a lema'an nitsedaq meemunat hamashicha velo mima'asey hatora ki mima'asey hatora lo yitsedaq kal-basar
veim nimatse gam-anachenu chataim bevaqeshenu lehitsadeq bamashicha hine hamashicha mesharet hachete chalila
ki im-ashuv veevene et-asher satareti e'ese et-'atsemi lefshe'a
ki-mati ani latora 'al-yedey hatora lema'an echeye lelohim
'im-hamashicha nitselaveti veanokhi lo echeye 'od ki im-hamashicha hu chay beqirebi vaasher ani chay 'ata babasar chay ani beemunat ben-elohim asher ahavani vayiten et-nafesho ba'adi
lo avatel et-chesed haelohim ki ilu yesh tsedaqa 'al-yedey hatora akh lashave met hamashicha
ahah galatim chaserey da'at mi hite'a etekhem bikheshafayv levileti shemo'a el-haemet acharey asher tsuyar yeshu'a hamashicha hatsaluv leneged 'eyneykhem
raq zot echepots lilemod mikem haim mima'asey hatora qibaletem et-harucha o mishemu'at haemuna
hasekhalim atem kal-kakh hachilotem barucha ve'ata tekhalu vabasar
hakhazot na'aneytem lariq im-amenam lariq
hine hamefiq lakhem et-harucha ufo'el bakhem gevurot hamikocha ma'asey hatora hu 'ose ele o mikocha shemu'at haemuna
kaasher heemin averaham belohim vatechashev lo litsedaqa
de'u efo ki-veney haemuna beney averaham hema
vehakatuv tsafa she'atid haelohim lehatsediq et-hagoyim mitokh haemuna veqidem levaser et-averaham lemor veniverekhu vekha kal-hagoyim
'al-ken yitebarakhu beney haemuna 'im-averaham hamaamin
ki veney ma'asey hatora 'aleyhem haqelala ki khatuv arur asher lo-yaqim et-kal-hadevarim haketuvim besefer hatora la'asot otam
vegaluy veyadu'a shebatora lo-yitsedaq haadam lifeney haelohim ki-tsadiq beemunato yicheye
vehatora lo min-haemuna hi ki im-asher-ya'ase otam haadam vachay bahem
hamashicha padanu miqilelat hatora biheyoto liqelala ba'adenu kakatuv qilelat elohim taluy
lema'an asher tavo birekat averaham bamashicha yeshu'a 'al-hagoyim lema'an asher niqach et-havetachat harucha 'al-yedey haemuna
achay kederekhe-adam ani medaber afilu tsavaa shel-ben-adam im-mequyemet hi lo yeferena ish velo-yosif 'aleyha
vehine leaveraham neemeru hahavetachot ulezare'o velo-amar velizera'eykha keilu larabim ela keilu leyachid velezare'akha vehu hamashicha
vezot ani omer ki berit asher qiyemah haelohim meaz lo tukhal hatora habaa acharey areba' meot ushelshim shana lehafer otah ulevatel et-hahavetacha
ki im-hanachala mitokh hatora hi eynena 'od mitokh hahavetacha vehaelohim chanan et-averaham 'al-yedey havetacha
im-ken-hatora mah-hi mipeney hapesha'im nosafa 'ad ki-yavo hazera' asher-lo hahavetacha vehi 'arukha 'al-yedey hamaleakhim uveyad metavekh
veeyn metaveykh leechad aval haelohim hu echad
ve'ata hamevatelet hatora et-havetachot haelohim chalila ki ilu nitena tora shebekhochah lehachayot az beemet hayeta hatsedaqa 'al-yedey hatora
aval hakatuv hisegir et-hakol beyad hachete lema'an tinaten hahavetacha el-hamaaminim beemunat yeshu'a hamashicha
velifeney vo haemuna shemurim usegurim hayinu tachat hatora eley haemuna ha'atida lehigalot
uvekhen hatora hayeta omenet otanu lamashicha lema'an nitsedaq baemuna
aval 'ata acharey asher baa haemuna eynenu 'od tachat yad haomen
ki-atem kulekhem beney elohim 'al-yedey haemuna bamashicha yeshu'a
ki khulekhem asher lamashicha nitebaletem levashetem et-hamashicha
veeyn 'od yehudi velo yevani eyn 'eved velo ven-chorin eyn zakhar velo neqeva ki khulekhem echad atem bamashicha yeshu'a
veim-lamashicha atem hinekhem zera' averaham veyoreshim kefi hahavetacha
vaani omer hayoresh kal-zeman shehu qaton af 'al-pi shehu adon hakol eyn beyno le'eved davar
ki im tachat yad omenim hu vetachat peqidey habayit 'ad lamo'ed hameyu'ad lo meet aviv
vekhen-anachenu be'odenu qetanim hayinu meshu'ebadim letiquney ha'olam
uvimelot hayamim shalach haelohim et-beno yelud isha venatun tachat yad-hatora
lifedot et asher hayu tachat yad-hatora lema'an neqabel mishepat habanim
veya'an ki-vanim atem shalach haelohim bilevavekhem et-rucha beno haqore aba avinu
lakhen eynekha 'od 'eved ki im-ben veim-ben ata hinekha gam-yoresh nachalat haelohim 'al-yedey hamashicha
hen lefanim beeyn-da'at elohim 'avadetem et asher be'atsemutam eynam elohim
ve'ata acharey asher-yeda'etem et-haelohim veyoter shenoda'etem lelohim eykh tashuvu el-hatiqunim harafim vehadalim hahem asher tiretsu lehikane'a lahem kevatechila
yamim atem shomerim vachodashim umo'adim veshanim
miteyare ani pen-yaga'eti vakhem lariq
heyu-na khamoni ki gam-ani kemokhem mitechanen ani lakhem echay lo-'asitem li meuma ra'
atem yeda'etem asher bechuleshat besari bisareti lakhem et-habesora barishona
veatem lo vezitem et-niseyoni asher-nuseyti bivesari velo ge'aletem oto ki im-qibaletem oti kemaleakh elohim kamashicha yeshu'a
ve'ata aye asherekhem hen me'id ani 'aleykhem sheim-yekhaletem heyitem noqerim et-'eyneykhem letitan li
ve'ata haleoyev niheyeyti lakhem bedaberi aleykhem emet
hema lo yeqaneu lakhem letova raq lehaferid beyneykhem uveyneynu yechepatsu lema'an teqaneu atem lahem
amenam tov leqane tamid letova velo biheyoti etselekhem bilevad
banay asher-ani natun shenit becheveley leda 'ad ki-yutsar bakhem hamashicha
amena chafatseti liheyot 'ata etselekhem leshanot et-qol devari ki navokh ani bakhem
imeru li atem hachafetsim liheyot tachat hatora halo shema'etem et-hatora
ki khatuv sheney vanim hayu leaveraham haechad min-haama vehasheni min-hachafeshiya
uven-haama nolad lefi habasar uven-hachafeshiya 'al-pi hahavetacha
vehadevarim hem mashal ki ele hen shetey haberitot haachat min-har sinay hayoledet le'avedut vehi hagar
ki-sinay hu har ba'arav vehu keneged yerushalayim shel-'ata ki-ve'avedut hi 'im-baneyha
aval yerushalayim lema'ela chafeshiya hi vehi em kulanu
ki khatuv rani 'aqara lo yalada pitsechi rina vetsahali lo-chala ki rabim beney-shomema mibeney ve'ula
vaanachenu echay hinenu kheyitsechaq beney hahavetacha
vekhaasher radaf az hanolad lefi-habasar et-hanolad lefi harucha ken-gam-'ata
vehakatuv mah-hu omer garesh haama veet-benah ki lo yirash ben-haama 'im ben-hachafeshiya
'al-ken echay lo-veney haama anachenu ki im-beney hachafeshiya
ve'ata 'imedu-na vacherut asher shicharar otanu hamashicha veal-tashuvu lehikavesh be'ol ha'avedut
hine ani folos omer lakhem sheim-timolu lo-yo'il lakhem hamashicha
ume'id ani 'od hapa'am bekhal-ish asher yimol shechayav hu lishemor et-hatora khulah
nigezaretem min-hamashicha atem hamitsetadeqim batora avadetem min-hechased
ki-anachenu barucha neyachel mitokh haemuna letiqevat hatsedaqa
ki vamashicha lo hamila techashev velo ha'arela ki im-haemuna hapo'elet beahava
heytavetem laruts mi chasakh etekhem mishemo'a el-haemet
hapituy haze eynenu meet haqore etekhem
me'at seor mechamets et-kal-ha'isa
muvetach ani vakhem baadon ki lo tiheye rucha acheret 'imakhem veha'okher etekhem yisa et-'aono yiheye mi sheyiheye
vaani achay im-akheriz 'od hamila 'al-ma eheye niredaf halo mevutal mikheshol hatseluv
mi yiten veyikaretu hamadichim etekhem
ki atem achay lacherut niqeretem uvilevad shel tiheye hacherut siba labasar ela sheta'avedu ish et-re'ehu beahava
ki khal-hatora kelula bamitseva haachat hazot veahaveta lere'akha kamokha
aval im-tenashekhu vetokhelu ish et-achiv reu pen-tekhulu ish 'al-yedey re'ehu
vehineni omer hitehalekhu barucha velo temaleu et-taaot habasar
ki habasar miteave hefekh min-harucha veharucha hefekh min-habasar usheneyhem miteqomamim ze laze uvekhen eyn atem 'osim et asher tachepotsu
veim-yiheye harucha manehigekhem az eynekhem tachat hatora
venoda'im hema pa'oley habasar asher hem niufim zenut tumea vezima
'avodat elilim ukheshafim eyvot umatsa veqinea varogez merivot machaloqot vekhitot
'ayin ra'a varetsach shikaron vezolalut vedomeyhem asher omar mah-shekevar amareti ki-'osey ele lo yinechalu malekhut haelohim
uferi harucha hu ahava simecha veshalom orekh rucha unedivut vechesed veemuna
va'anava uferishut leneged 'osey ele eyn-tora
vaasher hem lamashicha tsalevu et-besaram 'im-teshuqotayv vetaaotayv
im-nicheye varucha nitehalekha gam-barucha
velo niredof acharey khevod-shave lehakhe'is ish et-re'ehu uleqane ish et-re'ehu
echay af im-yitafes ish mikem ba'avera atem aneshey harucha teqimuhu berucha 'anava vehishamer lenafeshekha pen-tavo lidey-nisayon gam-ata
seu ish et-masa re'ehu ken teqayemu et-torat hamashicha
ki hachshev et-'atsemo liheyot-ma veeynenu meuma et-nafesho hu merame
aval yivechan kal-ish et-ma'asehu veaz lo levado tiheye tehilato velo keneged acher
ki khal-ish et-masao yisa
hamelumad badavar yachaloq mikal-tuvo limelamedehu
al-tite'u elohim lo-yiten lehatel bo ki et-asher yizera' haadam oto yiqetsor
ki hazore'a bivesaro yiqetsor kilayon mibesaro vehazore'a barucha yiqetsor min-harucha chayey 'olam
vaanachenu al-nilee ba'asot hatov ki-niqetsor be'ito im-lo nirepe
lakhen kaasher timetsa yadenu na'aseh-na et-hatov 'im-kal-adam uveyoter 'im-beney emunatenu
reu-na mah-gadol hamikhetav asher kataveti aleykhem beyadi
hachafetsim lehitehader babasar eyn kofim etekhem lehimol ela kedey shel-yeradefu 'al-tseluv hamashicha
ki gam-hem hanimolim lo yishemeru et-hatora raq retsonam asher timolu lema'an yitehalalu bivesarekhem
veanokhi chalila li mehitehalel bileti im bitseluv adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha asher-bo ha'olam nitselav-li vaani nitselav la'olam
ki-vamashicha yeshu'a lo-hamila techashev velo-ha'arela ki im-haberia hachadasha
vekhal-hanohagim kashura hazot shalom verachamim 'aleyhem ve'al-yiserael asher lelohim
me'ata ish al-yaleeni 'od ki et-chaburot haadon yeshu'a ani nose bigeviyati
chesed yeshu'a hamashicha adoneynu yehi 'im-ruchakhem echay amen ﻿
